codeReview.summary: The feature is close, but it does not fully satisfy required sidebar-linking/count behaviors in the feature contract.

issues.description: Clicking an entity row only dispatches FOCUS_ENTITY; no scroll-to-first-matching-highlight behavior is implemented. This misses expected behavior requiring panel click to scroll the document to the first matching highlight.

Decision group headers (Removing/Keeping/Your decision) render without count chips, and uncertain rows render a 'Review' tag instead of a count (line 244). This does not meet the feature requirement that count chips reflect group/entity counts.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker marked the UI skill procedure as followed while deferring a listed expected behavior (scroll-to-highlight) to another feature.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff file /Users/macbookpro/.factory/missions/03700c5a-5a07-4ab7-b688-0280f2e4ac86/handoffs/2026-04-09T08-12-10-619Z__preview-sidebar-panel__c702c7e6-c47a-413a-92e5-4fc1aad3241d.json states in whatWasLeftUndone that scroll-to-first-matching-highlight is not wired, while features.json expectedBehavior for preview-sidebar-panel includes document scroll on row click.

summary: Review failed: the implementation misses required panel-to-document scroll linking and required count-chip behavior for sidebar grouping.
